final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing brand style guide sheet for 染秋 (RAN QIU), an autumn-themed fragrance brand rooted in Eastern philosophy and traditional Chinese dyeing aesthetics.

Style/medium: clean flat editorial design, brand identity system reference sheet, inspired by Japanese and Chinese minimalist graphic design studios
Composition: portrait layout, structured into clearly labeled sections — primary color swatches, secondary/accent color swatches, and typography specimen — generous white space between sections, centered alignment
Subject: brand color system and typeface specification display for 染秋 (RAN QIU); primary palette drawn from osmanthus gold, persimmon amber, maple crimson, and deep oolong brown; secondary/accent palette including sandalwood beige, amber resin, misty sage, and ink black; typography pairing one classical Chinese serif (or brush-inspired display face) with a clean modern sans-serif
Scene/backdrop: off-white warm paper texture background, subtle aged-paper grain, no photographic scenery
Lighting/mood: flat even light, no shadows, calm and contemplative — evoking the poetic stillness of an autumn afternoon
Color palette: warm amber and burnt sienna as dominant anchors; deep umber and ink black as grounding neutrals; pale osmanthus cream as breathing space; no cool blues or greens
Text (verbatim): "染秋" "RAN QIU" "桂花乌龙" "琥珀枫叶" "柿霜暮色" "Primary Color" "Secondary Color" "Typography"
Constraints: all color swatches must display hex or color name labels beneath each swatch; typography section must show both Chinese and Latin characters in each typeface; layout must read clearly at A4 print size; brand name "染秋 (RAN QIU)" must appear as the header of the sheet
Avoid: photorealistic autumn scenery, gradients that obscure swatch boundaries, neon or synthetic colors, generic Behance flat-design clichés, clutter, drop shadows on swatches
